name: Sandbaggers Golf Spot
about: Sandbaggers Golf Spot is an indoor golf facility dedicated to making the game accessible and welcoming to all skill levels. The venue features state-of-the-art Foresight Sports simulators, a 1,000 sqft chipping and putting green, and PGA-certified coaching services. It operates on a membership model with various tiers offering flexible booking, advanced swing analytics, and community-focused events. The facility is designed to be a social hub where golfers can practice, play, and connect year-round, regardless of weather conditions. Membership benefits include priority booking, discounted rates, and access to members-only events, with a focus on fostering an inclusive community atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Foresight Sports simulators with accurate ball flight and precision analytics
A vibrant, inclusive community for networking and socializing with other golfers
Unlimited year-round practice with flexible booking and extended hours
Personalized coaching and professional club fitting services

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service
Full bar service available with alcoholic beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or the facility may provide rental clubs if available. Contact them for specific equipment options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted. Alcohol is served on-premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator setup and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sandbaggers Golf Spot is designed to be accessible to all skill levels, including juniors and youth golfers, making it family-friendly.
